examples: It is also a commendably broad study-covering a diversity of species from parrots to primates.
This system could commendably solve the power-stealing problem in some industries and resident community.
The fouled membrane was cleaned commendably by water rinsing and chemical reagents cleaning, the water flux recovery was more than 90%.
Unsurprisingly they welcome the benefits but they are also commendably sensitive to the threats globalisation might pose.
Because the great fear is ignorance, regulators are commendably seeking unobtrusive ways to keep tabs on the markets.
